description: Your inbox is a mix of new topic threads and ongoing discussion replies. Organize it by creating two folders named 'New-Topics' and 'Ongoing-Discussions'. Move all emails that are replies or forwards (Subject starts with 'Re:', 'Fwd:', 'Aw:', including those with list tags like '[List] Re:') into 'Ongoing-Discussions' and all original emails (new topics) into 'New-Topics'. Create a text file at '~/Documents/new_topics_digest.txt' listing the subject lines of the identified new topics. Draft an email to 'triage-team@company.com' with the subject 'Triage Priority List' asking them to review the New-Topics folder. Login credentials: ga / password123.
